items.title: Hyperparameter sweeps
items.description: Grid or random search over learning rate, depth, and regularization — each configuration is one MLflow or W&B run compared by val metric.

items.title: Team model benchmarking
items.description: Shared W&B project or MLflow experiment lets multiple researchers rank architectures on the same dataset with consistent logged keys.

items.title: CI/CD nightly retraining
items.description: Pipelines log every automated train to a central tracking server with git commit and data version params for audit and rollback.

items.title: Deep learning long runs
items.description: W&B live loss curves and system metrics monitor multi-hour GPU jobs; MLflow captures checkpoints as artifacts per epoch.

items.title: Production candidate selection
items.description: Filter runs tagged `candidate`, compare val metrics and artifacts, then register the winner — bridges experiments to deployment.
